directions_tried.name: Phase 1 — λ_max inequality stress test
directions_tried.outcome: PASS for ~300 configs but missed one-hot regime (later disproved by E003)

directions_tried.name: Phase 2 — Path D: Direct SU(2) bound
directions_tried.outcome: Complete analytical formula derived. Cross terms = commutator (L·b). C = C_curv(PSD) + C_comm(indefinite). Algebraic bound insufficient.

directions_tried.name: Phase 2 — Path B: Flat maximizer proof
directions_tried.outcome: DISPROVED — flat not global max at any d≥2. One-hot excess at d=3 (0.2%), d=4 (0.018θ²). Random walk d=2: 2.6% excess.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Adversarial stress test of λ_max(H_actual) ≤ λ_max(H_formula)
explorations_completed.key_finding: Passed for ~300 configs (max r=0.981) but missed one-hot small-angle regime where it fails

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Path D: Derive exact analytical Hessian formula for SU(2)
Path B: Test whether flat connections maximize λ_max(H_actual)
explorations_completed.key_finding: DISPROVED. λ_max(H_actual) > dβ for one-hot perturbations at d≥3 and random walk at d=2. B² formula route is broken.
